revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Oita | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | title = [[File:Shadow picture of Oita prefecture.png|20x20px|Shadow picture of Ōita Prefecture]][[Ōita Prefecture]] | above = [[Ōita (city)|Ōita]] <small>([[List of capitals in Japan|capital]])</small> | image = [[File:Flag of Oita Prefecture.svg|60px|border|Flag of Ōita Prefecture]] | listclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Core cities of Japan|Core city]] | list1 = *[[Ōita (city)|Ōita]]
| group2 = Cities | list2 = *[[Beppu]] *[[Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]] *[[Bungo-Ōno]] *[[Hita, Ōita|Hita]] *[[Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]] *[[Kunisaki]] *[[Nakatsu, Ōita|Nakatsu]] *[[Saiki, Ōita|Saiki]] *[[Taketa, Ōita|Taketa]] *[[Tsukumi, Ōita|Tsukumi]] *[[Usa, Ōita|Usa]] *[[Usuki, Ōita|Usuki]] *[[Yufu]]
| group3 = Districts | list3 = *[[Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]] **[[Hiji]] *[[Higashikunisaki District, Ōita|Higashikunisaki District]] **[[Himeshima, Ōita|Himeshima]] *[[Kusu District, Ōita|Kusu District]] **[[Kokonoe, Ōita|Kokonoe]] **[[Kusu, Ōita|Kusu]]
| below = [[List of mergers in Ōita Prefecture]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
[[Category:Japan prefecture templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Ōita Prefecture]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Oita | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | title = [[File:Shadow picture of Oita prefecture.png|20x20px|Shadow picture of Ōita Prefecture]][[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Ōita Prefecture]] | above = [[:en:Ōita (city)|Ōita]] <small>([[List of capitals in Japan|capital]])</small> | image = [[File:Flag of Oita Prefecture.svg|60px|border|Flag of Ōita Prefecture]] | listclass = hlist
| group1 = [[:en:Core cities of Japan|Core city]] | list1 = *[[:en:Ōita (city)|Ōita]]
| group2 = Cities | list2 = *[[:en:Beppu|Beppu]] *[[:en:Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]] *[[:en:Bungo-Ōno|Bungo-Ōno]] *[[:en:Hita, Ōita|Hita]] *[[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]] *[[Kunisaki]] *[[:en:Nakatsu, Ōita|Nakatsu]] *[[Saiki, Ōita|Saiki]] *[[Taketa, Ōita|Taketa]] *[[Tsukumi, Ōita|Tsukumi]] *[[Usa, Ōita|Usa]] *[[Usuki, Ōita|Usuki]] *[[Yufu]]
| group3 = Districts | list3 = *[[:en:Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]] **[[:en:Hiji|Hiji]] *[[:en:Higashikunisaki District, Ōita|Higashikunisaki District]] **[[:en:Himeshima, Ōita|Himeshima]] *[[Kusu District, Ōita|Kusu District]] **[[:en:Kokonoe, Ōita|Kokonoe]] **[[Kusu, Ōita|Kusu]]
| below = [[List of mergers in Ōita Prefecture]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
[[Category:Japan prefecture templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Ōita Prefecture]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Oita | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | title = [[File:Shadow picture of Oita prefecture.png|20x20px|Shadow picture of Ōita Prefecture]][[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Ōita Prefecture]] | above = [[:en:Ōita (city)|Ōita]] <small>([[:en:en:List of capitals in Japan|capital]])</small> | image = [[File:Flag of Oita Prefecture.svg|60px|border|Flag of Ōita Prefecture]] | listclass = hlist
| group1 = [[:en:Core cities of Japan|Core city]] | list1 = *[[:en:Ōita (city)|Ōita]]
| group2 = Cities | list2 = *[[:en:Beppu|Beppu]] *[[:en:Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]] *[[:en:Bungo-Ōno|Bungo-Ōno]] *[[:en:Hita, Ōita|Hita]] *[[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]] *[[:en:Kunisaki|Kunisaki]] *[[:en:Nakatsu, Ōita|Nakatsu]] *[[:en:Saiki, Ōita|Saiki]] *[[:en:Taketa, Ōita|Taketa]] *[[:en:Tsukumi, Ōita|Tsukumi]] *[[:en:Usa, Ōita|Usa]] *[[:en:Usuki, Ōita|Usuki]] *[[:en:Yufu|Yufu]]
| group3 = Districts | list3 = *[[:en:Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]] **[[:en:Hiji|Hiji]] *[[:en:Higashikunisaki District, Ōita|Higashikunisaki District]] **[[:en:Himeshima, Ōita|Himeshima]] *[[:en:Kusu District, Ōita|Kusu District]] **[[:en:Kokonoe, Ōita|Kokonoe]] **[[:en:Kusu, Ōita|Kusu]]
| below = [[:en:List of mergers in Ōita Prefecture|List of mergers in Ōita Prefecture]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
